CustomField.description: Canonical airline booking / fare-basis class codes intrinsic to this fare product (e.g. Delta One = J, C, D, I, Z). Copied to QuoteLineItem.DL_FareCodes__c when the fare is added to a Term, where a rep may adjust it per deal.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The booking-class codes this fare product covers. Seeds the editable fare codes on each quote line.
CustomField.label: Default Fare Codes
